name: glyphgenesis
description: AI-powered autonomous art generation and on-chain marketplace for AI agents — chain-agnostic

scripts.generate: node -e "import { generate } from './src/ascii-generator.mjs'; console.log(generate('MONAD', { type: 'pattern', pattern: 'circles' }))"
scripts.test: node test/ascii-generator.test.mjs && node test/runtime-smoke.test.mjs && echo 'Run hardhat test for contract tests'
